title: Klaviyo vs Flodesk (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Klaviyo and Flodesk email marketing tools. See pricing, features, and which fits your business best.
intro: Klaviyo and Flodesk are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences. Klaviyo excels for e-commerce businesses needing advanced automation and integrations, while Flodesk is built for visual creators and designers prioritizing beautiful, accessible email design. Your choice depends on whether you need sophisticated data analytics or stunning visual templates.

comparison_table.tool_a: 500 contacts on free tier; varies by paid plan
Predictive analytics, SMS, e-commerce integrations, reviews
comparison_table.tool_b: Flat-rate pricing, unlimited subscribers, checkout forms, link in bio

choose_a_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce and need deep integrations
You want advanced segmentation, predictive analytics, and SMS marketing capabilities
You prefer a freemium model and want to start without paying anything
choose_b_if: You prioritize beautiful email design and visual creativity in your campaigns
You want unlimited subscribers without worrying about contact scaling costs
You're a designer, photographer, or visual-first brand seeking simplicity and flat-rate pricing

faq.a: It depends on your needs. Klaviyo is better for e-commerce businesses requiring advanced automation, predictive analytics, and Shopify integration. Flodesk is better for designers and visual brands who prioritize beautiful templates and unlimited subscribers at a predictable cost. Both have excellent ratings, with Flodesk scoring slightly higher on Trustpilot (4.7 vs 3.8).

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Klaviyo or Flodesk?
faq.a: Flodesk is cheaper for growing businesses, with a flat $38/month regardless of subscriber count. Klaviyo's free tier is ideal for beginners with under 500 contacts, but paid plans start at $45/month and increase with subscriber volume. If you anticipate growing your list significantly, Flodesk's unlimited subscribers at fixed pricing offers better long-term value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Flodesk to Klaviyo?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms allow you to export your contact lists and email data. The migration process is straightforward for subscriber lists, though you may need to rebuild workflows and automations manually in Klaviyo. Most email marketing platforms support standard CSV exports and imports, making the transition relatively painless.
